mapper.select: select * from aiw_role_permission where role_code = #{roleCode} and permission_code = #{permissionCode}
select * from aiw_role_permission where role_code = #{roleCode} and is_deleted = 0 order by permission_code
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_role_permission (biz_id, role_code, permission_code, created_at, created_by, is_deleted, deleted_at) values (#{bizId}, #{roleCode}, #{permissionCode}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}) on duplicate key update created_at = values(created_at), created_by = values(created_by), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), deleted_at = values(deleted_at)
mapper.update: update aiw_role_permission set is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = current_timestamp(3) where role_code = #{roleCode} and is_deleted = 0
